channel.title: GitHub Rich Text Format Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rich Text Format in GitHub

item.title: mathoudebine/turing-smart-screen-python
item.description: Unofficial Python system monitor and library for small IPS USB-C displays like Turing Smart Screen or XuanFang

item.title: ckeditor/ckeditor5
item.description: Powerful rich text editor framework with a modular architecture, modern integrations, and features like collaborative editing.

item.title: Maradonna90/NewGAN-Manager
item.description: A tool to generate and manage xml configs for the Newgen Facepack.

item.title: artur-graniszewski/DLSS-Enabler
item.description: Simulate DLSS Upscaler and DLSS-G Frame Generation features on any DirectX 12 compatible GPU in any DirectX 12 game that supports DLSS2 and DLSS3 natively.
